What's Actually Happening

This Is Not a Willpower Problem

Manchester doesn't make anxiety easier. The mill city legacy and New Hampshire winters amplifies what was already there.

  • Feeling constantly on edge — even when nothing is wrong
  • Overthinking every decision, every conversation
  • Chest tightness, shallow breathing, racing heart
  • Using alcohol, food, or scrolling to come down at night

This is not a mindset problem. This is a nervous system stuck in a state it cannot leave without help.

Dr. Felicia Stoler
DCN · MS · RDN · FACSM · FAND · Dipl ACLM · Principal Investigator
Doctor of Clinical Nutrition. Registered Dietitian Nutritionist. Fellow of the American College of Sports Medicine. Board-certified Lifestyle Medicine physician. Fullscript-credentialed dispensary. She audits every protocol on this platform for clinical accuracy, safety, and outcome integrity. She never prescribes. She certifies the knowledge infrastructure that serves you.
Clinical Assessment

What BLEU Sees

BLEU · ALVAI Protocol Engine · Manchester, NH
Current State
Chronic sympathetic activation — fight-or-flight dominance with insufficient parasympathetic recovery.
Root Cause Analysis
  • Elevated baseline cortisol — the system is always braced for impact
  • HPA axis dysregulation — the stress response no longer self-corrects
  • Neurotransmitter imbalance — GABA suppressed, glutamate elevated
Protocol Components
  • Adaptogenic support (Ashwagandha KSM-66)
  • Magnesium L-Threonate (crosses blood-brain barrier)
  • L-Theanine (acute and maintenance dosing)
  • Structured breathing protocol (4-7-8 and box breathing)
  • Cortisol rhythm reset — morning and evening anchors
The Protocol

Anxiety Regulation Protocol

30 days
01
Ashwagandha KSM-66
Clinically studied adaptogen. Reduces cortisol 28% in 60 days at therapeutic dose.
02
Magnesium L-Threonate
The only magnesium form proven to cross the blood-brain barrier. Calms the CNS directly.
03
L-Theanine
Promotes alpha brain wave activity. Calm alertness without sedation.
04
Structured Breathing Protocol
Activates the vagus nerve. Shifts the nervous system from sympathetic to parasympathetic in minutes.

Common Questions

What People in Manchester Ask

What makes anxiety worse in Manchester specifically? +
Urban environments amplify baseline cortisol through noise, density, and social comparison. The protocol accounts for this.
How is this different from therapy or medication? +
This protocol works at the biochemical and nervous system level. It complements therapy — it does not replace it. Medication decisions remain with your physician.
How quickly does it work? +
L-Theanine works within 30–60 minutes. Adaptogenic support builds over 2–4 weeks. Full regulation takes 30 days.
Can I use this alongside my current anxiety medication? +
BLEU screens all combinations through its drug interaction engine. Always disclose your full medication list.
